daily.today_energy: Your intuition is absolutely glowing rn. The cosmos is whispering secrets just for you—trust those gut feelings that pop up unexpectedly. This is your moment to lean into your natural magic.
daily.love: Someone's been thinking about you more than you realize. Whether single or coupled, your emotional authenticity is magnetic today. Don't overthink it—just show up as yourself and watch the connections deepen.
daily.career: Your creative ideas have serious momentum behind them. This is the energy to pitch that project, share your vision, or take the lead on something you actually care about. Your perspective matters more than you know.
daily.health: Your body's asking for gentleness today. Move in ways that feel good—whether that's a walk, stretching, or just vibing to music. Mental wellness thrives when you honor what your spirit needs right now.

weekly.overview: Mercury's moving through your sector of intuition this week, Pisces. Trust those gut feelings hitting different—they're basically your cosmic group chat telling you what's up. Vibe shifts incoming.
weekly.love: Your emotional frequency is magnetic rn. Whether you're coupled up or solo, lean into authenticity over performance. Real connections thrive when you stop trying to be the 'chill' version of yourself.
weekly.career: Ideas are flowing but pace matters. You don't need to pitch everything immediately. Let your creative energy marinate a bit—your colleagues will notice the shift in your presence this week.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentler rhythms. Skip the productivity grind and honor what actually refuels you—whether that's water, rest, or just existing without a to-do list. Self-care isn't lazy.
